📣 Exciting opportunity for students!

The EY Simulation Challenge 2026 – A Day As an EYian, organised by the EYCC Rise Team, is officially open for registration! 🚀
 
Who is the EYCC Rise Team?
They’re a studentled team under the EY Campus Champs programme, working with EY professionals to create impactful, careerboosting initiatives for students.
 
What is the “EY Simulation Challenge”?
It’s an immersive, careerbuilding experience where students step into the shoes of real EY professionals. Participants will take on Assurance and Consulting simulations, solve realworld business problems, work in dynamic teams, and pitch their solutions in a highenergy final round. Think of it as a mini corporate world — brought directly to you! 💼⚡
 
What opportunities does this challenge provide?
✨ Handson exposure to Assurance & Consulting
✨ Practical experience solving real business cases
✨ A chance to develop leadership, teamwork & critical thinking
✨ Guidance from EY professionals
✨ Great for your resume — boosts corporate readiness
✨ Opportunity to network with likeminded peers and industry mentors
✨ Experience what it’s like to be an “EYian” for a day!
 
🗓 Key Dates
• Registration: 8 Mar – 8 Apr
• Preliminary Rounds (Online): 11 & 12 Apr
• Final Stage (Physical @ UNITEN): 2 May
👥 Team Size: 4–5 members
(Recommended: 3 Business + 2 STEM students for a strong balance)

📲 Stay updated: @eycc_rise_team 

🔗 Register now: https://forms.gle/DPwKx4PJZfVBvvEE6

🚀 CAREER JUMPSTARTER 2026 is here, your gateway to the industry starts now!

Step into a day of real opportunities, insights, and connections with leading firms such as PwC, EY, KPMG and other established industry players. Whether you're preparing for internships or your first full-time role, this is where you get ahead.

🌟 Perks you don’t want to miss:
• Direct networking with industry leaders and firm representatives
• Real-time feedback from mock interviews
• Resume reviews by professionals
• Insights on professional qualifications & career pathways
• Exposure to top firms & recruiters
• Lucky draw sessions
• 3 iCadet Points

📌 Learn directly from those shaping the industry and gain the edge you need in today’s competitive landscape.

🕙 10:00 AM
📍 Dewan Tun Canselor, MMU Cyberjaya

✨ Session 3 (1pm - 3pm) – 1 point

📢 Open to all for Session 2 and Session 3

Every great club needs its backbone, its spark, and its balance.
That‘s why the Cyberjaya Accounting Club is now recruiting for essential positions in our executive team:

📖 Event Director - The creative spark of the club.
You’ll plan, design, and execute events that bring our members together and make memories.

Joining the team isn‘t just about filling a role — it’s about leadership, growth, and being part of something bigger. You‘ll gain hands-on experience, strengthen your resume, and create a lasting impact on the Cyberjaya Accounting Club.

Don’t wait — apply now and take your first step into
leadership. Together, let‘s make this term unforgettable!

✨ And that’s a wrap!
Our ACCA Business Challenge 2025 has officially come to a close, and we couldn’t be prouder of how everything turned out. A huge thank you to @acca_malaysia for being our generous sponsor and for believing in the vision behind this event. Your support made this entire experience possible. ❤️

To all our amazing participants — thank you for your passion, your hard work, and the energy you brought to the competition. Every team showed impressive effort, creativity, and professionalism. Watching you all step up, challenge yourselves, and shine on stage was truly inspiring. 🌟

We hope this event has been meaningful for you, and we can’t wait to see where your journey takes you next. Until we meet again! 🚀

#CAC #MMUCyberjaya #CyberjayaAccountingClub #StewardshipTowardsExcellence #ACCAMalaysia

CAC welcomes all members and the public to our upcoming AGM: CAC Night 2025🎉

In this December, we will be celebrating CAC Night 2025 — a night of unity, appreciation, and growth as we honour our dedicated BODs and commemorate CAC. The event will feature reflections on our journey, recognition moments, performances, and networking opportunities with invited professional bodies and industry partners. It will also mark the symbolic transition as we welcome the new BODs who will carry CAC forward.

*AGM: CAC Night 2025*

📅Date: 14 December 2025
⏳Time: 6.30pm-10.30pm
📍Venue: Moksha Event Hall
No. 15-1, Block K, Jalan GC 14, Glomac 2, 63000 Cyberjaya, Selangor

🚨 *Seats are limited!*
Secure your spot now by filling in the registration form now!

✨ Top 5’s of CAC Term 2024/2025 ✨

Presenting to you Vickie Leing Wei Chi, the President; Esther Tan Hui Xin and Pek Jin Yen, the Vice Presidents; Rosemary D’silva, the Secretary; and Puteri Balqis, the Treasurer for this term. 

The Top 5 serve as the principal advisory body to the directors and committees, ensuring smooth coordination and effective communication across all levels of the club. They play a key role in supporting decision-making, managing finances, overseeing documentation, and providing expert guidance on interpreting and applying the club’s policies and provisions. Additionally, they foster collaboration among all members to ensure that the club operates efficiently and aligns with its core mission.

This dynamic team is dedicated to leading CAC with integrity and purpose. Through their collaborative leadership and shared strategic vision, they are ready to work alongside the directors and committee members to enhance the club’s operations and drive growth, making a meaningful impact on the community throughout the 2024/2025 term.

📣 Introducing the Board of Directors | Term 2024/2025 📣

Say hello to the faces leading the Cyberjaya Accounting Club into a new chapter of growth, innovation, and collaboration! 💼✨

We are here to serve, inspire, and drive excellence across all our initiatives — from academic support to career development and community engagement. With their passion and vision, we’re ready to make this term the most impactful yet!

“Stewardship Towards Excellence”

Not sure what type of accountant you want to be? You’re not alone.​
If you’ve ever been asked, “Which area of accounting are you interested in?” and didn’t know what to say — this session is for you.​

Find Your Fit is an online event by Chartered Accountants Australia and New Zealand (CA ANZ) that’s all about helping you explore what’s out there before you choose your path. Whether you’re into numbers, strategy, people, or tech, accounting and finance offer more specialisations than you think.​

What’s in it for you?​
📌Hear directly from industry leaders about what their day-to-day really looks like​
📌Learn about career paths you didn’t even know existed​
📌Grow your network with the industry leaders and peers​
📌Expand your knowledge of the industry​

It’s free, it’s online, and it might just help you figure out where you belong.
 
Event Details (choose either one):
Australia Session
Wednesday, 13th August, 3pm-4pm

 
New Zealand Session 
Thursday, 14th August 1pm-2pm

🧠📋The Internal Engagement (IE) Division plays a key role in shaping the heart of the Cyberjaya Accounting Club: its people. 

For the 2024/2025 term, the division is led by Aveeniskh and Jeremy ,who are dedicated to building a cohesive and vibrant community within CAC.

IE focuses on strengthening the connections between the Board of Directors, EXCOs, and club members through a series of well-crafted internal initiatives. By fostering teamwork, communication, and appreciation, we aim to create an environment where every individual feels valued, motivated, and part of something greater.

Through a variety of engaging events and bonding activities, the division works to ensure that CAC remains not just an organization, but a family; united in purpose, driven by collaboration, and ready to support one another through every challenge and success. 😎🎊

🎓💼 Paving the Path to Academic Excellence

Introducing the Education Division (ED) of Cyberjaya Accounting Club (CAC) Term 2024/2025 — where knowledge meets purpose, and learning is led with passion.

🤝📚 Led by Ainin and Aiman, the ED Division thrives on collaboration, support, and continuous growth.

We’re here to spark exploration, discovery, and lifelong learning — while forging strong ties with professional bodies to bring real-world, career-focused events to students.

From promoting professional papers to sharpening job-ready skills, ED is your launchpad to a future in business and accounting. 🚀💼

Introducing the Industrial Relations (IR) Division of the Cyberjaya Accounting Club (CAC) Term 2024/2025, where opportunities are made and connections turn into careers.

🌟 Led by Amish and Jiwetha, the IR Division builds solid bridges between CAC and the professional world by collaborating with top firms to bring career-enhancing experiences to students.

Whether it’s office visits, CV workshops or our signature Career Jumpstarter events, we make sure students don’t just dream about success, but step into it.

With every handshake and every email sent, IR isn’t just about external relations, it’s about opening doors for the future. 📨🚪

📅 Enrolment Period: Jul 29 - Aug 14

For more info click here www.micpacaanz.com

caption:
Every great club needs its backbone, its spark, and its balance.
That’s why the Cyberjaya Accounting Club is now recruiting for three essential positions in our executive team:

🖋️ Secretary – The backbone of our operations. You’ll keep our meetings on track, records organized, and communication smooth.

💼 Treasurer – The balance-keeper of our finances. You’ll manage budgets, track spending, and make sure our resources are used wisely.

🎉 Event Director – The creative spark of the club. You’ll plan, design, and execute events that bring our members together and make memories.

Joining the team isn’t just about filling a role — it’s about leadership, growth, and being part of something bigger. You’ll gain hands-on experience, strengthen your resume, and create a lasting impact on the Cyberjaya Accounting Club.

📅 Don’t wait — apply now and take your first step into leadership. Together, let’s make this term unforgettable!

📢 NexSymp 2025: Where Artificial Intelligence Meets Sustainability

Multimedia University (MMU) Press, in collaboration with IEEE MMU SB, proudly presents NexSymp 2025, a premier hybrid research symposium that brings together researchers, innovators, and thinkers to shape a smarter, greener future.

📅 Date: 11th & 12th September 2025
📍 Venue: Telekom Malaysia Digital Academy (TMDA), MMU Cyberjaya
🔗 Format: Hybrid (Physical & Online)

With the theme “Artificial Intelligence Meets Sustainability”, NexSymp 2025 will explore diverse domains from Arts to Technology, offering a unique platform to exchange groundbreaking ideas and research across multiple disciplines.

💡 Don’t miss out, mark your calendar for this exciting symposium that bridges creativity, technology, and sustainability.

👉 Visit our NexSymp website and MMU Press for more information. 
MMU Press: 
https://www.mmupress.com/
Nexsymp 2025: 
https://www.mmupress.com/nexsymp/

Public Relations is the bridge between CAC and the MMU community—crafting compelling stories, amplifying voices, and ensuring every message leaves a meaningful mark.

The PR Division continues to lead in media relations, content creation, and publication efforts that shape the identity and outreach of CAC. Beyond that, the division plays a vital role in planning inclusive, non-accounting-related events to engage students from all backgrounds and faculties—ensuring everyone has a place within the vibrant CAC community. ✨🌟
